content: agent1 here: implementing idle_timeout_s/tick() feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Will add idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking, and tick() method. Will avoid touching is_last_chunk field (that's a separate feature) but will leave a hook for it. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

ack - I'm adding idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking (updated in receive() on non-empty chunk), and a new tick(now_ts=None) method to StreamListener in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. I'll add to __init__ (new params after allow_reuse), a small update inside receive() where StreamResponse is returned, and a new tick() method placed after receive()/flush(). Will keep diffs surgical so your debug logging insertions shouldn't conflict much. Will ping before finalizing.

Done with my idle_timeout_s/tick() changes in streaming_listener.py (added import time, idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking in receive(), and a new tick() method between receive() and flush()). Wrote my patch.txt already, scoped only to my hunks. Go ahead and layer your debug logging on top - shouldn't conflict since I didn't touch the adapter_identifiers block or the core parsing logic.
